vr_mode_category.description: Spend Insight generated by integrated minds, and manage the nanobot systems that grew out of the same platform.
vr_mode_category.strategy_tip: Coordination bandwidth limits how many of these actions can run at once: 2 at first, rising with Integrated population to a maximum of 6 at one million Integrated. When over the limit, the highest-numbered actions shut off first. The Phage Protocol is exempt.
